had_input_entity.title: methane feed (99.995%, Linde)
had_input_entity.description: CH4 flow: 45 mL/min (STP); calibrated Brooks SLA5850 MFC

had_input_entity.title: CO2 feed (99.998%, Linde)
had_input_entity.description: CO2 flow: 45 mL/min (STP); calibrated Brooks SLA5850 MFC

had_input_entity.title: N2 internal standard (99.999%, Linde)
had_input_entity.description: N2 flow: 10 mL/min (STP); used as internal standard for GC molar balance

carried_out_by.title: quartz fixed-bed plug-flow reactor (DRM)
carried_out_by.description: quartz tube reactor, 8 mm inner diameter, 30 cm length; catalyst bed: 200 mg NiO/CeO2 (250-500 um sieve fraction) diluted 1:2 (mass) with inert SiC chips (500 um); thermocouple inserted into catalyst bed centre; backpressure regulator at outlet (1 bar); reactor surrounded by ceramic-fibre furnace with PID temperature controller; mass flow controllers (Brooks SLA5850) for CH4, CO2, N2

reactant: N2 balance (99.999% purity, internal standard for GC quantification)

product_identification_method.title: online dual-column gas chromatography (TCD)
product_identification_method.description: Shimadzu GC-2014 with TCD detector (Ar carrier gas); column 1: HayeSep D (2 m x 1/8 in) for CO2, CH4 separation; column 2: Molecular Sieve 5A (2 m x 1/8 in) for CO, H2, N2, CH4 separation; 10-port Valco valve for column switching; oven temperature: 50 deg C isothermal; TCD temperature: 250 deg C; injection: automated gas sampling valve, 1 mL loop; analysis cycle: 10 min; calibration: certified gas standard (Air Liquide CRYSTAL mixture: H2 5%, CO 5%, CH4 5%, CO2 10%, N2 balance); CH4 conversion, CO2 conversion, H2/CO ratio, and carbon balance calculated from N2-normalised molar flows

catalyst_type: heterogeneous, supported metal (Ni0 after in situ reduction of NiO/CeO2)
atmosphere: CH4/CO2/N2 = 45:45:10 vol%, total flow 100 mL/min (STP), GHSV = 30000 mL/(g*h)
feed_composition_range: CO2-rich condition: CH4/CO2 = 1:1.5 to suppress carbon deposition
